message:
perf(scheduler): relax Parker waiting counter from SeqCst to Acquire/Release

The waiting counter is an optimization hint for unpark() to skip the
mutex when no threads are parked. Correctness is guaranteed by the
notified AtomicBool. A stale read of waiting only causes a harmless
extra mutex+condvar signal, so SeqCst is unnecessary overhead on every
park/unpark cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
